title: Open work permits for family members of foreign workers - Canada.ca
content:
## Open work permits for family members of foreign workers
Some family members of foreign workers in Canada may be eligible to apply for an open work permit .
A family member is defined as a
- spouse or common-law partner
- dependent child of the dependent child (for example: grandchildren)
Check processing times
Work permit fee: CA$155
Open work permit holder fee: CA$100
